chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3608 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِنَّ اَللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى جَعَلَ أَرْزَاقَ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ مِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ يَحْتَسِبُونَ وَ ذَلِكَ أَنَّ اَلْعَبْدَ إِذَا لَمْ يَعْرِفْ وَجْهَ رِزْقِهِ كَثُرَ دُعَاؤُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3608 - Imam (as) said: "Indeed, Allah (swt), Blessed and Exalted, has made the sustenance of the believers come from where they do not expect. This is because when a servant does not know the source of his sustenance, his supplications increase."
